description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines, set on a rectangular lot with a wooden deck. The house features large floor-to-ceiling windows on the rear side, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor living area. A swimming pool with adjacent lounge chairs and a shaded patio area is situated at the back, surrounded by palm and ornamental trees. The front of the house includes a driveway with a parked car and a small entryway, while the side yard is landscaped with additional greenery. The exterior is primarily finished in white with some light wood accents on the roof and deck. The overall design emphasizes open space, outdoor living, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a wooden deck, swimming pool, and landscaped yard featuring palm and ornamental trees. The design is minimalist and emphasizes outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, car, main entryway, and two palm trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage door, and a clear view of the flat roof and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the pool, lounge chairs, and more of the landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large windows, patio dining area, swimming pool, and extensive deck with lounge chairs.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry with a single door, no steps, and minimal decorative elements
